channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: GOP vows to stop lone activist judges from halting Trump agenda
item.description: Republicans are bashing a federal judge's ruling blocking the deportation of suspected gang members and say they are moving to ensure such an occurrence does not happen again.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he won't 'fire people' over Signal messages, reiterates support of national security team
item.description: President Donald Trump is making his clearest commitment to not fire anyone over an embarrassing accidental leak of his administration’s plans for an airstrike against the Houthis in Yemen.
item.dc:creator: Chris Megerian, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Wisconsin AG sues to stop Musk's check handout
item.description: Wisconsin Attorney General Josh Kaul sued Elon Musk on Friday over his proposal to pay two people $1 million for voting in the state's Supreme Court race. “The Wisconsin Department of Justice is committed to ensuring that elections in Wisconsin are safe, secure, free, and fair.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Most US Institute of Peace workers get late-night word of their mass firing
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Most employees at the U.S. Institute of Peace, a congressionally created and funded think tank now taken over by Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency, received email notices of their mass firing, the latest step in the Trump administration's government downsizing.
item.dc:creator: GARY FIELDS and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tesla Takedown: Anti-Musk protesters mobilize for Global Day of Protest at hundreds of Tesla locations
item.description: A Global Day of Protest has been planned for Saturday, during which anti-Musk protesters plan to demonstrate at hundreds of Tesla showroom locations across the globe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Richard Carlbom ascends to top role at Minnesota DFL Party as its first new chair in 14 years
item.description: Richard Carlbom was chosen as the Minnesota DFL Party chair, rising to the top post after years of working behind the scenes on party elections and causes.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: Critics see Trump attacks on the 'Black Smithsonian' as an effort to sanitize racism in US history
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — President Donald Trump's order accusing the Smithsonian Institution of not reflecting American history notes correctly that the country's Founding Fathers declared that “all men are created equal.” But it doesn't mention that the founders enshrined slavery into the U.S.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Meet the DOGE team
item.description: Several members of Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) made their first public appearance. Here's who they are.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: Signal chat shows isolationist Vance as Trump flexes control abroad
item.description: The war plans group chat uncovered by a journalist at The Atlantic exposed some daylight between Vice President Vance and others in the administration, showing Vance’s hesitance about launching a military strike that President Trump has hailed this week as necessary and successful.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Minnesota loses $27.5 million in behavioral health funds as part of Trump administration cuts
item.description: Overnight this week, the Minnesota Department of Human Services lost hundreds of contracts, amounting to $27.5 million, after massive federal cuts from the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Tom Crann and Gretchen Brown, MPR News

item.title: California governor candidate Chad Bianco says he'd abolish the state income tax if elected
item.description: Citing a desire to “restore the California Dream for all,” a Republican candidate in the 2026 race to become California’s next governor says he’d eliminate the state’s income tax if elected.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Trump holds 'productive call' with new Canadian prime minister
item.description: President Trump spoke with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney on Friday for the first time since Carney was elected earlier in the month amid tensions between the two nations.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: McConnell: U.S. headed for ‘Russia wins, America loses’ headline on Ukraine deal
item.description: Former Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.) warned in a speech Thursday that U.S. negotiators trying to end the war in Ukraine are headed for a “Russia wins, America loses” headline if they agree to a deal that achieves only “illusory peace.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Noted economist honored by Trump warns his 25% tariffs could add $4,711 to the cost of a vehicle
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Noted economist Arthur Laffer warns in a new analysis that President Donald Trump's 25% tariffs on auto imports could add $4,711 to the cost of a vehicle and says the proposed taxes could weaken the ability of U.S. automakers to compete with their foreign counterparts.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DOJ investigating California universities over affirmative action
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) announced Thursday it will be investigating multiple California universities to ensure they are in compliance with a Supreme Court ruling banning affirmative action in admissions.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daughter of slain Hamas hostages files suit against Columbia groups
item.description: The lawsuit claims Khalil and other student groups at Columbia helped spread Hamas messaging on Columbia University's campus.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Perkins, NewsNation

item.title: Foragers want a seat at the rulemaking table as DNR mulls mushroom, berry bag limits
item.description: The DNR is considering bag limits on how much food people can take from state-managed lands. That gallon limit is ringing alarm bells for foraging groups like the Minnesota Mycological Society.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Is the fight over? Florida bill to allow guns on campus gets shot down
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (WFLA) — A rare rejection happened at the state capitol as a Republican-led bill was voted down by a fellow GOP lawmaker. Senate Bill 814 would have allowed concealed carry on college campuses, but it died in its first committee stop.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida House proposes largest sales tax cut in state history
item.description: The Florida House of Representatives is proposing the largest cut to sales tax in state history, from 6% to 5.25%.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Fanning, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court for OK to cut teacher-training money as part of anti-DEI push
item.description: The Trump administration is at the Supreme Court with a new emergency appeal, this time seeking approval to go ahead with cuts of hundreds of millions of dollars for teacher training.
item.dc:creator: MPR News

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers to make Trump White House visit next month
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers plan to visit President Donald Trump at the White House to celebrate their World Series victory, the team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo talks possible Medicaid cuts, education, movie studios
item.description: Republican Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo said he may have to call a special session later in the year to handle possible cuts from the federal government that directly impact the state budget.
item.dc:creator: David Charns, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Florida 'inmate bill of rights' would require improving prison conditions
item.description: A Tampa Bay lawmaker is fighting for legislation that would protect the rights of prisoners in the state's corrections system.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: FBI launches Tesla vandalism task force
item.description: The FBI confirmed Monday it has established a task force to investigate the wave of vandalism and arson incidents targeting Tesla in recent weeks.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Trump portrait to be removed from Colorado Capitol after president's criticism
item.description: President Trump has criticized a portrait of himself hanging in the Colorado Capitol, suggesting it was intentionally distorted, while Republican lawmakers have asked for it to be removed.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, Fox 5

item.title: Trump administration asks Supreme Court to halt judge's order to rehire probationary federal workers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration asked the Supreme Court on Monday to halt a ruling ordering the rehiring of thousands of federal workers let go in mass firings aimed at dramatically downsizing the federal government.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge blocks three agencies from disclosing troves of sensitive personal data to DOGE
item.description: A federal judge on Monday indefinitely blocked the Department of Government Efficiency's access to troves of sensitive personal data from three federal agencies.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: Judge won't lift block on Trump use of Alien Enemies Act to deport Venezuelans
item.description: U.S. District Court Judge James Boasberg declined to lift a restraining order barring the Trump administration from using the Alien Enemies Act to deport Venezuelans, determining migrants are likely to succeed in pushing for hearings on whether they are in a gang.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms relationship with Vanessa Trump
item.description: “Love is in the air and life is better with you by my side! We look forward to our journey through life together,” Woods said on X, where he has 6.4 million followers.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
